description: Stage 17 pilot for emergent phase-synchronization dynamics on the frozen projected transverse architecture.
selection_rationale: The pilot tests whether weak phase-coupled feedback produces self-sustained synchronization in one phase-ordered triad, one transport-dominated corridor, and one clustered composite anchor. The base layer is intentionally limited to nine runs so the first read stays diagnostic rather than exploratory.

base_seed_reference.selection_note: strongest coherent periodic transverse seed carried through Stages 11-17

resolution_policy.followup_gate: Only promote a case to the 12->24 ladder if the base pilot shows a real synchronization gain over null without global artificial coherence.
resolution_policy.selection_note: The first pilot is kept at n=12 so the synchronization read stays directly comparable to Stages 15 and 16.

canonical.label: analytic envelope phase
canonical.construction: packet-local weighted signal around the evolving centroid, passed through a Hilbert transform and read as the analytic-signal phase
why_selected: continuous phase time series for R(t)
comparable across triad, corridor, and clustered anchor

control.label: dominant-mode projection phase
control.construction: complex phase of the local packet state projected onto the dominant narrowband carrier mode
why_selected: checks whether any locking signal is extraction-method dependent
reuses the frozen carrier structure rather than inventing a new mode basis

phase_coupling.feedback_form: dX/dt += eps * sum_j W_ij * sin(phi_j - phi_i)
phase_coupling.weight_source: frozen kernel-induced packet coupling graph with bounded local normalization
phase_coupling.normalization_rule: no global coherence normalization; each row is clipped and normalized only over local packet neighbors
phase_coupling.feedback_phase_note: The control proxy is used for the actual feedback step because it is instantaneous and local; the analytic-envelope phase remains the canonical scoring signal.
phase_coupling.selection_note: The coupling is derived from internal packet relations and remains in the very-weak/weak regime only.

representatives.notes: best non-degenerate phase-ordered carrier for synchronization diagnostics
transport-dominated control for corridor locking and frequency pulling
dense interaction anchor for testing whether synchronization can appear where binding remained fragile

runs.notes: very weak phase-coupling probe for phase-ordered triad
weak phase-coupling probe for phase-ordered triad
very weak phase-coupling probe for transport corridor
weak phase-coupling probe for transport corridor
very weak phase-coupling probe for clustered anchor
weak phase-coupling probe for clustered anchor

gate_1_dual_proxy_consistency.rule: candidate positive only if the canonical proxy shows a gain and the control proxy does not contradict it strongly

gate_2_sustained_order_not_peak_order.rule: require sustained increase in at least two of the three records; one-frame peaks do not count

gate_3_phase_variance_compression.rule: candidate positive must show lower phase variance than null over a nontrivial time fraction

gate_4_cluster_stability.rule: do not count constant flicker as locking; require either stable cluster count or longer dominant-partition dwell than null

gate_5_frequency_compression.rule: require lower frequency spread than null; phase alignment without frequency pulling is weak evidence

gate_6_morphology_cross_check.rule: any claimed positive must show at least one morphology correlate; otherwise classify as transient synchronization

gate_7_symmetry_caution.rule: high R alone is insufficient; require frequency compression, cluster stability, and preferably one morphology correlate

freeze_negative_if_all_9_runs_show: no increase in mean or sustained R(t)
strict_stopping_rule.instruction: Do not increase epsilon blindly if the base pilot is null.

note_on_freeze_rule.freeze_negative_if: all 9 runs show no sustained R gain, no variance compression, no cluster stabilization, and no morphology correlate
note_on_freeze_rule.purpose: prevents coefficient chasing after a null base pilot
